title: Ability to rearrange actions within automations recipes

posts.author: bibujakera (Bibi Bujakera)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good day,
I’d like to be able to move the automations recipes or actions up or down without having to delete them.
From the image attached, I’d like to be able to move “Set Feedback Message to Yes” (the last action) on top, before “Send Quote End Date to Today”(the first action).
I would like to achieve that without having to delete all actions and start again from scratch.

Thank you.
